title: Custom E-commerce Development
subtitle: Online Stores Without Platform Fees
hero_badge: No Shopify · No Monthly Fees · 100% Custom
description: Online stores built exclusively in Next.js & React with Stripe payments. No platform monthly fees, no limitations, no templates.
features_description: Every e-shop is built from scratch with these building blocks.
payment_methods_description: Every payment method your customer needs — built in.
premium_features_subtitle: Enhance your online store with advanced features that drive sales and automate operations.
cta_description: Tell us what you want to sell and we'll send you a proposal within 24 hours.
why_custom: Full design control — exactly as you want it
Faster loading — no bloat from plugins
Custom features that don't exist in ready-made platforms
Easy scaling as your business grows

features.title: Custom Product Catalog
features.description: Categories, filters, search, variants — designed exactly for your products.

features.title: Stripe Payments
features.description: Cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, IBAN. Secure checkout without redirects.

features.title: Order Management
features.description: Custom admin panel for orders, inventory, shipping and invoicing.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Revenue, conversion rate, top products. All in one custom dashboard.

features.title: Automations
features.description: Confirmation emails, low-stock alerts, abandoned cart — automatically.

features.title: Security by Design
features.description: HTTPS, rate limiting, secure sessions, PCI-compliant payment flow.

payment_categories.description: Visa, Mastercard, Amex — the foundation of every e-shop.
BNPL increases average order value by 30-50%.
EU bank transfers & instant payments. Critical for Greece.
Still popular in Greece — we don't ignore it.
For scale to EU & global markets.

premium_features.title: Advanced Analytics
premium_features.description: Deep insights into customer behavior, sales performance, and conversion optimization.

premium_features.title: Subscription System
premium_features.description: Recurring revenue platform for subscription boxes, memberships, and recurring orders.

premium_features.title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace
premium_features.description: Multi-vendor platform with vendor management, commission tracking, and dispute resolution.

premium_features.title: Inventory Management
premium_features.description: Real-time inventory tracking, automatic reordering, and warehouse management integration.
